dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My designs are the best, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: There was no way that lion-chan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Perhaps they will be able to rest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, brook, we're going on ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: That's right. I have joined the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So, we've got a pretty good crew?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Ah!! But I'm already dead!! Yoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Yeah, it was hard to move.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: There should be some interesting people there---!!!
